subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before My throne and inscribed within My Book! Upon thee be My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی عرشی و المسطور فی کتابی علیک بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی ان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
